changelog:
## What's Changed
* Fix CSRF, stale human-input entries, span lifetime, args redaction, backpressure, URL allow-list, i18n, ICO format by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/32
* fix(main_agent): backpressure-aware OrchestratorSender::send by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/34
* fix: emit ToolApprovalExpired event on approval oneshot timeout/error by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/33
* Perf by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/31
* Calendar: fix put_schedule validation, accessibility, perf, and stray build artifact by @Copilot in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/36
* Calendar by @azerothl in https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/pull/35


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/azerothl/Akasha/compare/v0.1.0...v0.2.0
